citations.narrative:
The research facility did not submit their FY 2025 Annual Report. All registered facilities must submit an annual report to
the Deputy Administrator on or before December 1 of each calendar year. The report shall cover the previous Fiscal Year
and is necessary to inform the Institutional Official and the USDA of the scope and extent of the animal use at the facility.
The annual report shall include the numbers of live animals the facility used or intends to use in research, tests,
experiments or for teaching. The facility must correct this issue by submitting a FY 2025 report.
*****Correct by April 30, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.36(a) 
   
Annual report. 
The research facility did not submit their FY 2025 Annual Report. All registered facilities must submit an annual report to 
the Deputy Administrator on or before December 1 of each calendar year. The report shall cover the previous Fiscal Year 
and is necessary to inform the Institutional Official and the USDA of the scope and extent of the animal use at the facility. 
The annual report shall include the numbers of live animals the facility used or intends to use in research, tests, 
experiments or for teaching. The facility must correct this issue by submitting a FY 2025 report.  
*****Correct by April 30, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
